name: 天气现象
subject: inquiry
domain_name: 地球与宇宙 / Earth & Space / Earth & Space
curriculum_points: Students in PYP 1-3 will be able to observe, measure (using simple tools), and record daily weather conditions, identifying patterns over time.
Students in PYP 4-5 will be able to analyze how the interaction of air, water, and solar energy causes different weather phenomena and extreme weather events.

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 探究式学习动画：问题→假设→实验→结论流程可视化
interactive_resources.description: Canvas/JS 探究学习过程可视化
